_comment: Converted gold transformations for the retail estate. One entry per graph pipeline (names match the rt_* nodes in objects.csv/edges.csv so build+certify rows join to the graph). {src} is the replicated raw source in catalog.test_schema. dev/sample phase certifies a clean build; prod phase certifies 100% parity vs source_metrics_sql.

pipelines.name: rt_ingest_pos
pipelines.databricks_sql:
SELECT s.sale_id,
       s.store_id,
       s.customer_id,
       s.sale_ts,
       s.channel,
       si.line_no,
       si.product_id,
       si.qty,
       si.unit_price,
       si.discount
FROM {src}.sales s
JOIN {src}.sale_items si ON si.sale_id = s.sale_id
pipelines.source_metrics_sql: SELECT s.sale_id, s.store_id, s.customer_id, s.sale_ts, s.channel, si.line_no, si.product_id, si.qty, si.unit_price, si.discount FROM retail_src.sales s JOIN retail_src.sale_items si ON si.sale_id = s.sale_id

pipelines.name: rt_ingest_ecom
pipelines.databricks_sql:
SELECT web_order_id,
       customer_id,
       product_id,
       order_ts,
       qty,
       unit_price
FROM {src}.web_orders
pipelines.source_metrics_sql: SELECT web_order_id, customer_id, product_id, order_ts, qty, unit_price FROM retail_src.web_orders

pipelines.name: rt_loyalty_sync
pipelines.databricks_sql:
SELECT customer_id,
       customer_name,
       email,
       city,
       region,
       segment
FROM {src}.customers
pipelines.source_metrics_sql: SELECT customer_id, customer_name, email, city, region, segment FROM retail_src.customers

pipelines.name: rt_build_core
pipelines.databricks_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id,
       c.customer_name,
       c.region,
       c.segment,
       COUNT(DISTINCT s.sale_id) AS orders_count,
       ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(si.unit_price * si.qty * (1 - si.discount)), 0), 2) AS lifetime_net,
       MAX(CAST(s.sale_ts AS DATE)) AS last_order_date
FROM {src}.customers c
LEFT JOIN {src}.sales s ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id
LEFT JOIN {src}.sale_items si ON si.sale_id = s.sale_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.region, c.segment

pipelines.name: rt_build_web
pipelines.databricks_sql:
SELECT p.product_id,
       p.product_name,
       p.category,
       SUM(si.qty) AS units_sold,
       ROUND(SUM(si.unit_price * si.qty * (1 - si.discount)), 2) AS net_amount
FROM {src}.products p
JOIN {src}.sale_items si ON si.product_id = p.product_id
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.category

pipelines.name: rt_build_marts
pipelines.databricks_sql:
SELECT CAST(s.sale_ts AS DATE) AS cal_date,
       st.region,
       COUNT(DISTINCT s.sale_id) AS order_count,
       ROUND(SUM(si.unit_price * si.qty), 2) AS gross_amount,
       ROUND(SUM(si.unit_price * si.qty * si.discount), 2) AS discount_amount,
       ROUND(SUM(si.unit_price * si.qty * (1 - si.discount)), 2) AS net_amount
FROM {src}.sales s
JOIN {src}.sale_items si ON si.sale_id = s.sale_id
JOIN {src}.stores st ON st.store_id = s.store_id
GROUP BY CAST(s.sale_ts AS DATE), st.region

pipelines.name: rt_publish_serving
pipelines.databricks_sql:
SELECT CAST(s.sale_ts AS DATE) AS cal_date,
       st.region,
       ROUND(SUM(si.unit_price * si.qty * (1 - si.discount)), 2) AS net_amount
FROM {src}.sales s
JOIN {src}.sale_items si ON si.sale_id = s.sale_id
JOIN {src}.stores st ON st.store_id = s.store_id
GROUP BY CAST(s.sale_ts AS DATE), st.region
pipelines.source_metrics_sql: SELECT CAST(s.sale_ts AS DATE) AS cal_date, st.region, ROUND(SUM(si.unit_price * si.qty * (1 - si.discount)), 2) AS net_amount FROM retail_src.sales s JOIN retail_src.sale_items si ON si.sale_id = s.sale_id JOIN retail_src.stores st ON st.store_id = s.store_id GROUP BY CAST(s.sale_ts AS DATE), st.region

pipelines.name: rt_daily_master
pipelines.databricks_sql:
SELECT CAST(s.sale_ts AS DATE) AS cal_date,
       COUNT(DISTINCT s.sale_id) AS orders,
       COUNT(DISTINCT s.customer_id) AS active_customers,
       ROUND(SUM(si.unit_price * si.qty * (1 - si.discount)), 2) AS net_amount
FROM {src}.sales s
JOIN {src}.sale_items si ON si.sale_id = s.sale_id
GROUP BY CAST(s.sale_ts AS DATE)
pipelines.source_metrics_sql: SELECT CAST(s.sale_ts AS DATE) AS cal_date, COUNT(DISTINCT s.sale_id) AS orders, COUNT(DISTINCT s.customer_id) AS active_customers, ROUND(SUM(si.unit_price * si.qty * (1 - si.discount)), 2) AS net_amount FROM retail_src.sales s JOIN retail_src.sale_items si ON si.sale_id = s.sale_id GROUP BY CAST(s.sale_ts AS DATE)
